title: Add Automatic Payment Receipt System

requirements.text: Extend the backend Customer record to include paymentStatus (text: 'pending' | 'success'), paymentDate (optional timestamp in nanoseconds), and receiptId (optional text, format VOC+timestamp digits). Add a new update function `markPaymentSuccess(customerId)` that sets paymentStatus='success', paymentDate=current time, and generates a unique receiptId (e.g., 'VOC' + Int.toText(Time.now() / 1_000_000) truncated to a short numeric suffix). Ensure existing records default paymentStatus to 'pending' and receiptId to null.

quotes: Admin or system must mark record: status = "paid", paymentStatus = "success", paymentDate = current timestamp
Generate unique receipt ID: VOC + timestamp

acceptanceCriteria: Customer record has paymentStatus, paymentDate, and receiptId fields.
Calling markPaymentSuccess sets paymentStatus to 'success', paymentDate to current timestamp, and receiptId to a unique VOC-prefixed string.
Existing customers without these fields default to paymentStatus='pending' and null receiptId.
receiptId format matches VOC followed by numeric digits (e.g., VOC17092026).

requirements.text: Add a React Query mutation hook `useMarkPaymentSuccess` in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` that calls the backend `markPaymentSuccess` function and invalidates the customers query on success.

quotes: When admin marks payment successful: customer receipt page must auto refresh and show receipt instantly

acceptanceCriteria: useMarkPaymentSuccess mutation calls the backend markPaymentSuccess function.
On success, the customers query cache is invalidated so all consumers re-fetch fresh data.
The hook is exported from useQueries.ts for use in AdminPage and ReceiptPage.

requirements.text: Add a 'Mark as Paid' button in AdminPage.tsx for each customer record whose paymentStatus is not 'success'. Clicking it calls the useMarkPaymentSuccess mutation for that customer, transitions the button to a loading state, and on success shows a visual confirmation (green checkmark / 'Paid' badge) and disables the button. Display the receiptId in the admin row once available.

quotes: Admin or system must mark record: status = "paid"
When admin marks payment successful: customer receipt page must auto refresh and show receipt instantly

acceptanceCriteria: Each customer row in AdminPage shows a 'Mark as Paid' button when paymentStatus is not 'success'.
Button enters loading state during mutation and is replaced with a green 'Paid' badge after success.
The receiptId value (e.g., VOC17092026) is visible in the admin row after being set.
Already-paid customers show the Paid badge and receiptId without a 'Mark as Paid' button.

requirements.text: Create a new page `frontend/src/pages/ReceiptPage.tsx`. This page accepts a customerId (or mobile number) as a URL/route parameter, fetches the customer record, and renders a clean printable payment receipt when paymentStatus='success'. The receipt must include: (1) Header — 'Vijay Online Centre' and 'Successful Payment Receipt', (2) Customer Details — Customer Name, Mobile Number, Service Name, (3) Payment Details — Payment Status: SUCCESSFUL ✅, Amount Paid: ₹{amount}, Payment Method: UPI QR, Paid To (UPI ID): 8173064549@okicici, Receiver Name: Vijay Online Centre, Transaction Date & Time, (4) Receipt Number — the receiptId (VOC+timestamp). If paymentStatus is still 'pending', show a waiting/pending state and poll every 5 seconds to auto-refresh until payment is confirmed.

quotes: Automatically generate a digital receipt (payment slip)
Paid To (UPI ID): 8173064549@okicici
Receiver Name: Vijay Online Centre
customer receipt page must auto refresh and show receipt instantly

acceptanceCriteria: ReceiptPage renders all required fields: customer name, mobile, service name, amount, UPI ID 8173064549@okicici, receiver name, transaction date/time, and receiptId.
Header displays 'Vijay Online Centre' and 'Successful Payment Receipt'.
Payment status shows a green 'SUCCESSFUL ✅' badge.
When paymentStatus is 'pending', the page shows a pending state and polls the backend every 5 seconds.
Once paymentStatus becomes 'success', the receipt renders automatically without a manual page refresh.

requirements.text: Style ReceiptPage with a clean, white, print-optimized design: center-aligned header with the business name in bold, a large green 'SUCCESS' text/badge at the top, clearly separated sections for customer and payment details in a card layout, and a receipt number displayed prominently at the bottom. Use the existing navy/saffron color palette for branding accents. Apply print-specific CSS (@media print) to hide navigation, buttons, and non-receipt content when printing.

quotes: Clean white printable design
Center aligned header
Green success badge
Show big SUCCESS text

acceptanceCriteria: Receipt is displayed on a white background with center-aligned header.
A large green 'SUCCESS' badge/text is prominently shown.
Customer details and payment details are in clearly separated, labeled sections.
Receipt number is displayed at the bottom.
@media print CSS hides header navigation, buttons, and footer so only the receipt content prints.

requirements.text: Add a 'Print Receipt' button and a 'Download Slip' button to ReceiptPage. The Print button triggers window.print(). The Download Slip button uses the browser's print-to-PDF flow (or a client-side HTML-to-PDF library such as html2canvas + jsPDF) to generate and download a PDF of the receipt named 'VOC-Receipt-{receiptId}.pdf'.

quotes: Add Print and Download PDF button
Add button: 'Download Slip'
Generate PDF version of receipt

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Print Receipt' button calls window.print() and only the receipt content is printed.
A 'Download Slip' button generates and downloads a PDF file of the receipt.
The downloaded file is named using the pattern VOC-Receipt-{receiptId}.pdf.
Both buttons are hidden during print (@media print).

requirements.text: Add a mobile number search feature to ReceiptPage (accessible via a public route). Render a search input at the top of the page that accepts a 10-digit mobile number. On search, fetch the matching customer record and display the receipt if paymentStatus='success', or show a 'Payment pending' message if not yet paid.

quotes: Receipt must be viewable anytime using mobile number search

acceptanceCriteria: A mobile number input field is visible on the ReceiptPage when no customerId is pre-filled.
Entering a valid mobile number and submitting fetches and displays the matching receipt.
If no matching paid record is found, a clear 'No paid receipt found for this mobile number' message is shown.
If the record exists but paymentStatus is pending, a 'Payment pending' message is shown.

requirements.text: After the customer completes the payment step in PaymentPage.tsx (the success step), automatically redirect the customer to the ReceiptPage for their submission, passing the customerId as a route/query parameter.

quotes: Customer automatically redirected to receipt page

acceptanceCriteria: After the payment step in PaymentPage shows success, the user is automatically navigated to the ReceiptPage.
The customerId is passed as a parameter so the receipt can be loaded directly.
The ReceiptPage correctly loads the customer record using the passed customerId.

requirements.text: Register the ReceiptPage route in App.tsx so it is accessible at a path such as '/receipt' (with optional query params for customerId or mobile number) without requiring admin authentication.

quotes: Customer automatically redirected to receipt page
Receipt must be viewable anytime using mobile number search

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to '/receipt' renders ReceiptPage without requiring login.
Query parameters (customerId or mobile) are read and used to load the appropriate receipt.
The route is added to App.tsx alongside existing home/payment/admin routes.

constraints: UPI ID must be exactly '8173064549@okicici' and Receiver Name must be 'Vijay Online Centre' — hardcoded in the receipt.
Receipt ID format must be 'VOC' followed by numeric timestamp digits (e.g., VOC17092026).
Do not change existing admin credentials or authentication logic.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
All Motoko changes must remain in backend/main.mo as a single actor.
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket push — polling every 5 seconds is sufficient for live update.
Email or SMS delivery of receipts.
Payment gateway integration — QR-based UPI payment flow already exists; this only adds receipt generation.
